Parainfluenza Tests 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/parainfluenza-tests/ 
Parainfluenza Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a parainfluenza test? 
Parainfluenza viruses are a group of four types of viruses. They are a common cause of respiratory (breathing) illnesses. These illnesses can affect your, nose, throat, lungs, and bronchial tubes (the airways that carry air to your lungs). Parainfluenza tests check whether a parainfluenza virus is causing an illness.
